content.text: Plan a 10-day Japan itinerary covering Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka with food recommendations.

Here is a 10-day plan: 4 nights Tokyo (Shinjuku, Asakusa, a day trip to Hakone), 3 nights Kyoto (Fushimi Inari, Arashiyama), 2 nights Osaka (Dotonbori street food). I grouped sights by neighborhood to minimize transit.
